title: gymnadenia conopsea f. trifida
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea f. trifida, also known as the lesser twayblade, is a rare, terrestrial orchid species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and terpene content. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Gymnadenia conopsea f. trifida typically include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are used to treat various conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
